code:
---
config:
  theme: neo
  layout: dagre
---
stateDiagram
  direction LR
  classDef draftC fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef publicC fill:#bbf8c0,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef unlistedC fill:#f9f7ae,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef privateC fill:#ddd6f3,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef withdrawnC fill:#fcbbbb,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  [Education_GradeSync] --> draft
  draft --> public:Publish
  draft --> unlisted:Link only
  public --> unlisted:Unlist
  unlisted --> public:List
  public --> private:Hide(Education_GradeSync)
  unlisted --> private:Hide(Education_ContentCDN)
  private --> public:Re-publish
  private --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  public --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  unlisted --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  withdrawn --> public:Restore(Education_GradeSync)
  withdrawn --> [Education_GradeSync]
  draft:Draft
  public:Public
  unlisted:Unlisted
  private:Private
  withdrawn:Withdrawn
  note right of draft : Drafts are only visible to editors.
  note right of public : Public posts are listed and discoverable.
  note right of unlisted : Unlisted posts are shared by URL only.
  note right of private : Private posts are hidden from everyone.
  note right of withdrawn : Withdrawn posts are removed from public view.
  class draft draftC
  class public publicC
  class unlisted unlistedC
  class private privateC
  class withdrawn withdrawnC

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育内容管理系统设计一个发布状态流转图。核心场景是GradeSync模块的内容生命周期管理，从草稿开始，要能发布成公开状态，也要有仅链接可见的半公开模式。
明白，我梳理一下：起点是GradeSync，先到draft草稿态。然后draft可以分支到public完全公开，或者unlisted仅链接分享？这两个状态之间能互相切换吗？
对的，public和unlisted可以双向转换——公开内容可以取消列出变成仅链接，反之也可以重新上架。另外还需要一个private私有态，以及withdrawn撤稿态作为终态之一。
好的，我先把主干状态画出来：draft、public、unlisted、private、withdrawn五个节点，并标注draft是仅编辑者可见，public是可被发现，unlisted是URL分享，private是完全隐藏。
elements_involved: Drafts are only visible to editors
Public posts are listed and discoverable
Unlisted posts are shared by URL only
Private posts are hidden from everyone

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 隐藏操作需要区分触发来源：从public隐藏到private要走GradeSync的权限系统，但从unlisted隐藏则要走ContentCDN的缓存清理流程。withdrawn撤稿后，GradeSync可以发起恢复。
理解了，Hide操作带系统来源标注，Restore明确是GradeSync恢复。withdrawn除了能恢复，还应该能直接回到GradeSync终态？另外所有状态都能撤稿吗？
是的，public、unlisted、private都能撤稿到withdrawn。withdrawn可以恢复public，也可以直接终结回GradeSync。最后给每个状态配上颜色区分：草稿粉色、公开绿色、仅链接黄色、私有紫色、撤稿红色。
完成。状态图采用从左到右布局，五个状态节点带色值定义，所有流转关系已标注操作名称和触发系统，右侧注释说明各状态可见性规则。withdrawn的恢复和终结路径也都连好了。
elements_involved: note right of withdrawn : Withdrawn posts are removed from public view
